CustomField.description: OBS Last Contact Date from the Account or SaaS Primary Contact.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c)), ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c) ), Account__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c), NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c)) ), SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c, IF( Account__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c > SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c, Account__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c, SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.OBS_Last_Contacted__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The most recent task or event logged by the OBS team on the Account or SaaS Primary Contact's record that are associated to the Combined Funnel.
CustomField.label: OBS Last Contacted
